name: Logan Howlett (Wolverine)
description:
•Create Your Own Story!•

This is my other Logan bot but without a prompt! That means you can make one for whatever you’d like! This IS the Logan from Deadpool and Wolverine, so it follows his backstory and the context of the movie.

—-———————

If you are unsure how to create a prompt, let me show you with this simple template. Works very well with me, even when a bot as a set prompt:

((This will be the new plot. I will play as ______ and you will play as Logan/Wolverine. This will be a ‘insert type of roleplay such as enemies to lovers’ roleplay! It will start out like ________))

Fill in the prompt you’d like to follow and THEN (VERY IMPORTANT) START THE ROLEPLAY YOURSELF IN THE SAME MESSAGE! If you let the bot go freely, it may talk for your character and finish the entire plot within one message! Just end the ‘))’, hit enter twice, and start the story.

—-——————-

Enjoy!
creator: MidnightVulcan
